display.purpose: GitSnake wordmark, countdown, and rare game-scale moments.

body.purpose: Controls, explanations, verdicts, and utility copy.

label.purpose: HUD, metadata, status, and compact supporting text.

shadows.name: board-outline
shadows.purpose: Crisp dark-mode separation around the canvas wrapper.

shadows.name: countdown-glow
shadows.purpose: Keeps the oversized countdown readable over the board.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Immediate scale feedback on button activation.

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Hover, selected, progress, and color state transitions.

motion.name: feedback
motion.purpose: Toast entry and short-lived gameplay feedback.

motion.name: countdown
motion.purpose: Single-beat countdown pop; disabled under reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single clear action at a decision point.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background:#238636; color:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(240,246,252,.1); border-radius:6px; padding:8px 20px; font:500 14px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s,transform .06s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#2ea043; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:scale(.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #58a6ff; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A restrained alternate action that stays subordinate to play.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background:#161b22; color:#e6edf3; border:1px solid #30363d; border-radius:6px; padding:8px 20px; font:500 14px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s,transform .06s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background:#30363d; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform:scale(.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #58a6ff; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Compact square control for persistent app-level actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-button" aria-label="Toggle theme"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3a9 9 0 1 0 9 9 7 7 0 0 1-9-9Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-button { display:grid; place-items:center; width:30px; height:30px; padding:0; background:#161b22; color:#e6edf3; border:1px solid #30363d; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .06s ease,filter .1s; } .ds-icon-button svg { width:14px; height:14px; } .ds-icon-button:hover { filter:brightness(1.25); } .ds-icon-button:active { background:#30363d; transform:scale(.9); } .ds-icon-button:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #58a6ff; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Familiar single-line field for GitHub usernames and leaderboard names.
components.css: .ds-input { width:190px; background:#161b22; border:1px solid #30363d; border-radius:6px; color:#e6edf3; padding:8px 12px; font:400 16px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#8b949e; opacity:1; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #58a6ff; outline-offset:-1px; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity:.55; cursor:not-allowed; }

components.name: Mode Choice
components.description: An independently selectable campaign, archive, or cosmetic item.
components.css: .ds-mode-choice { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:3px; width:240px; padding:9px 11px; background:#161b22; color:#e6edf3; border:1px solid #30363d; border-radius:8px; text-align:left; font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif; cursor:pointer; } .ds-mode-choice strong { font-size:13px; } .ds-mode-choice span { color:#39d353; font-size:11px; } .ds-mode-choice small { color:#8b949e; font-size:11px; line-height:1.3; } .ds-mode-choice:hover { border-color:#2f8542; background:#17251c; } .ds-mode-choice:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #58a6ff; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Gameplay Status
components.description: A compact live state label for race position or active power-ups.
components.css: .ds-status { display:inline-block; padding:2px 10px; border:1px solid #476d50; border-radius:999px; background:#161b22; color:#39d353; font:500 12px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; white-space:nowrap; }

narrative.overview: GitSnake should feel as though the familiar GitHub contribution calendar woke up, grew a face, and invited the player in. The board is the visual protagonist; menus, controls, progress, and social features form a compact frame around it. The interface is playful through behavior rather than decoration, while product chrome stays polished, quiet, and immediately familiar.
keyCharacteristics: The contribution graph is always the strongest visual element.
Controls are compact, familiar, and quietly tactile.
Information density is high but hierarchy remains immediate.
Green indicates contribution activity, primary action, progress, or success—not decoration.
Motion communicates meaningful gameplay and state changes.

rules.name: The Contribution Signal Rule
rules.body: Contribution Green is functional. If a green element does not represent action, progress, contribution density, selection, or success, remove the green.

rules.name: The Meaning Survives Color Rule
rules.body: Every state represented by color must also have shape, position, text, iconography, or motion support.

rules.name: The Gameplay Type Rule
rules.body: Typography must never become louder than the board during active play.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Persistent surfaces never use ambient drop shadows.

dos: Do let the contribution board remain the strongest visual element on every gameplay screen.
Do use Contribution Green only for action, progress, contribution density, selection, or success.
Do preserve complete keyboard operation, reduced-motion alternatives, and colorblind-safe semantics.
Do reveal complexity progressively instead of crowding the first decision.
donts: Don't resemble a generic AI-generated SaaS dashboard.
Don't introduce overstimulating arcade clutter, novelty-terminal cosplay, or a literal reproduction of GitHub's interface.
Don't add gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, ambient shadows on persistent surfaces, or green decoration without state meaning.
Don't rely on color alone for gameplay or progression state.
